fixesApplied: Tightened small-text and metadata contrast across the Seraph-specific parchment and blueprint surfaces without flattening the manuscript palette.
Sharpened the focal cinnabar and supporting hierarchy colors so the page emphasis reads closer to the references.
Added a final isolated HeroFrameCalibration Storybook story so the hero/frame/divider language is reusable and inspectable outside the composed pages.
residualRisks: This is the last configured repair pass, so if the next strict review still rejects, the run will end below the user's target and a successor process or another loop will be needed.
Even after calibration, the result may still be short of truly exact reference matching because no image-based verification or deterministic visual diff exists in this agent-only process.
exampleSurfaces: shared Seraph rendering paths remain aligned through MockupPreviews
